name: Netherite
description: Scalable Minecraft server infrastructure on Kubernetes with auto-scaling, gRPC microservices, and a custom admin panel. 300 peak CCU across 20+ services.

projects.name: Netherite
projects.description: Engineered scalable Minecraft server infrastructure on Kubernetes with auto-scaling via Agones and microservice communication over gRPC for player data, instance management, currency, and metrics. Maintained a custom PaperMC fork enabling S3-based dynamic world loading and locking between instances, backed by an in-house plugin framework spanning 100k+ lines of Kotlin. Peaked at 300 concurrent players across 20+ microservices on 3 Kubernetes nodes with 99.9% uptime.

projects.name: Netherite: Prison
projects.description: The Minecraft Prison experience, refined. Built with a scalable world loading system - stored in Amazon S3 - and seamlessly sharded across multiple servers.

projects.name: Netherite: Panel
projects.description: The Netherite Panel is a web-based control panel which manages config, deployments, audit logs, and other features of the Netherite network. It's built with NextJS, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GRPC, and various other technologies.
